name: Setup didn't work
about: ChatGPT couldn't complete the setup smoke test, or the archive/recall commands aren't working.
title: "Setup didn't work: <one line summary>"
labels: ["setup-failure"]
assignees: []
---

> Please don't paste private notes, real names, or anything sensitive into this issue.

## What I tried

- ChatGPT model I used:
- ChatGPT plan (free / Plus / Pro / Team / etc.):
- GitHub connector status (granted to all repos / select repos / didn't grant):
- Did the setup smoke-test file appear in `logs/smoke-tests/` of my private repo? (yes / no)
- Did the archive command produce a real Markdown file in `categories/<category>/`? (yes / no)
- Did the recall command open with "I pulled your AI You context"? (yes / no)

## What happened

A short description of what went wrong. Use placeholders like "Sam" or "Project X" for any names.

## What I expected

A short description of what you expected.

## Anything I already tried

For example:

- switched ChatGPT model
- re-ran the setup prompt
- toggled the GitHub connector off and on
- checked `docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md`
